我是您的专属企业智能助手，将协助你完成今日的工作。您可以在左侧根据场景选择适合的: I am your exclusive enterprise intelligent assistant and will help you with today's work. You can select a suitable assistant from the left side according to the scenario to serve you.
可通过 \"#\" 选择上下文 \"/\" 选择变量: Use "#" to select context and "/" to select variables
按下 Cmd + Enter 换行，Option + ↑/↓ 切换历史消息: Press Cmd + Enter to wrap, Option + ↑/↓ to switch historical messages
